energiser.title: Build a Create: New Age Energiser (rotation + FE → specialized power)

generator_coil.title: Build a Create: New Age Generator Coil connected to your rotational network

electric_motor.title: Build a Create: New Age Electric Motor (FE → rotation conversion)

subtitle.translate: Rotation into electricity. Electricity back to rotation. The loop is closed.

description: Create: New Age bridges Create's SU rotation system with FE electricity.
Generator Coil: rotation → FE. 24 SU base impact.
Add up to 12 Magnets and Carbon Brushes to increase output.
Electric Motor: FE → rotation (reverses the conversion).
Energiser: uses rotation AND FE simultaneously for special applications.
This is the grid that powers the nuclear path.
Both alternative paths to the Steam Engine without Blaze Burners.
